subject: Scaffold monorepo with services, web, infra, migrations, and Makefile targets
description: Create services/api FastAPI, services/ingest Python, services/rag Python, web Next.js minimal, docker-compose with postgres+pgvector and neo4j, SQL migrations for provenance schema, and Make targets up/migrate/ingest:quran_sample/test with verification.

metadata.evidence: services/ingest/, services/rag/, Makefile, docker-compose.yml all created
